entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated groundnut, also known as Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnut caused by Phaeoisariopsis personata

entities.name: PHAEOISARIOPSIS PERSONATA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes late leaf spot

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or fight off late leaf spot

entities.name: PRIMARY GENE POOL
entities.description: The genetic resources of cultivated groundnut

entities.name: SECONDARY GENE POOL
entities.description: Genetic resources from closely related wild Arachis species

entities.name: ARACHIS SPECIES
entities.description: Wild diploid species related to cultivated groundnut

entities.name: DIPLOID
entities.description: A cell or organism containing two complete sets of chromosomes

entities.name: TETRAPLOID
entities.description: A cell or organism containing four complete sets of chromosomes

entities.name: DETACHED LEAF TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method used for screening plants for resistance to late leaf spot

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: SYNTHETIC GROUNDNUT
entities.description: New tetraploid sources of Arachis hypogaea developed at ICRISAT
